## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.getProcedure() method

Gets a procedure by its composite ID. Used internally by RuntimeFillingRecipe for procedure resolution.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getProcedure(id: string): Result<IProcedureEntity>;
```
